notes:
nhắn tin = to send a text message (SMS or chat message). It’s about texting, not sending things in general.

It’s a verb. You usually use it for phone messages (SMS, Messenger, Zalo, etc.).  
Common patterns: nhắn tin cho + someone (focus on the receiver) and nhắn tin với + someone (emphasizes texting back and forth).

Close synonym: text (in English); in Vietnamese, people also just say text in casual speech, but nhắn tin is the standard phrase.
exampleSentences: Nếu em rảnh thì nhắn tin cho anh vào tối nay nhé.
Anh thường nhắn tin với bạn bè mỗi ngày sau giờ làm việc.
Chị quên nhắn tin cho mẹ nên mẹ gọi lại hỏi thăm.
exampleSentencesTranslated: If you are free, send me a message tonight.
I usually send messages to my friends every day after work.
She forgot to send a message to her mom, so her mom called to check in.

definitions.en: To send a message via text or messaging app.
definitions.vi: Gửi một tin nhắn qua tin nhắn hoặc ứng dụng nhắn tin.
definitions.es: Enviar un mensaje a través de un texto o aplicación de mensajería.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ nhắn tin cho bạn sau.
example.es: Te enviaré un mensaje más tarde.

translation.en: Do you have a message for me?

notes_md:
**nhắn tin** = to send a text message (SMS or chat message). It’s about texting, not sending things in general.

It’s a verb. You usually use it for phone messages (SMS, Messenger, Zalo, etc.).  
Common patterns: **nhắn tin cho + someone** (focus on the receiver) and **nhắn tin với + someone** (emphasizes texting back and forth).


Close synonym: **text** (in English); in Vietnamese, people also just say **text** in casual speech, but *nhắn tin* is the standard phrase.
